Host helper component for selecting DARTWIC channels.
The SDK wrapper is untyped, so accepted props are currently host-defined.

# Import

```ts
import { ChannelComboBox } from "@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui/dartwic";
```

# Accepted Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Host-defined | `any` | Current SDK does not export a stable prop type for this helper. |
